CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident is at risk for developing pressure ulcers. -=Not assessed/no information
0=No
1=Yes
413 M0210_STG_1_HGHR_ULCR_CD M0210_STG_1_HGHR_ULCR_CD M0210 One or More Stage 1 or Higher Unhealed Pressure Ulcer Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident had one or more unhealed pressure ulcer(s) at Stage 1 or higher. -=Not assessed/no information
0=No
1=Yes
414 M0300A_STG_1_ULCR_NUM M0300A_STG_1_ULCR_NUM M0300A Stage 1
